appPromo.headline: Great food, greater deals on the app.

branchOpeningHours.defaultMessage: This branch has a schedule update. Please check the availability before placing your order.
branchOpeningHours.browseNotice: You can still browse the menu, but ordering may be unavailable during this schedule window.

banner.title: About Us
banner.description: Delivering happiness, one meal at a time.

story.paragraphOne: What started in a small kitchen with a single bike has transformed into a culinary network that bridges the gap between the world's best chefs and your dining table. Food Editorial was born from the belief that convenience should never compromise quality.
story.paragraphTwo: We curate every restaurant, vet every driver, and test every route to ensure that when your doorbell rings, it's not just a meal, it's an experience.

missionVisionValues.missionDescription: To deliver fast, fresh, and affordable culinary delights to every doorstep without the environmental footprint.
missionVisionValues.visionDescription: To become the world's most loved delivery service, recognized for our taste and logistical precision.
missionVisionValues.valuesDescription: Quality above all, speed as a standard, and putting the customer at the heart of every decision we make.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose Us
whyChooseUs.easyDescription: A seamless interface designed for speed and clarity.
whyChooseUs.fastDescription: Our AI-powered routing ensures your food arrives piping hot.
whyChooseUs.qualityDescription: We only partner with top-tier, hygiene-certified restaurants.

testimonials.title: What Our Users Say
testimonials.lisaText: The only app that delivers food that actually looks like the pictures. Absolute perfection every time.
testimonials.davidText: Lightning fast delivery. I don't know how they do it, but my pasta is always steaming hot.
testimonials.miaText: Sustainability and quality all in one. The packaging is eco-friendly and the taste is 5-star.

cta.appDescription: Download our app for the fastest experience and exclusive daily deals.
cta.subscribeDescription: Join our mailing list for curated weekly menus and secret discount codes.

helpCenter.title: The Help Center.
helpCenter.description: Navigating the intricacies of culinary governance and editorial standards with ease and transparency.
helpCenter.accountDescription: Security protocols, profile authentication, and editorial credentials.
helpCenter.deliveryDescription: Logistics standards, temperature integrity, and carrier compliance.
helpCenter.paymentDescription: Invoicing cycles, secure transactions, and financial reconciliation.
helpCenter.legalDescription: Regulatory updates, privacy terms, and trust framework.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Essential knowledge for our editorial partners.
faq.credentialQuestion: How do I verify my editorial credentials?
faq.credentialAnswer: Editorial credentials can be verified through the Secure Partner Portal. Navigate to 'Identity Management' and upload your certified documentation for review by our Trust Board.
faq.safetyQuestion: What are the food safety standards for luxury deliveries?
faq.safetyAnswer: Our protocols require real-time temperature tracking and archival-grade packaging. All partners must adhere to the ISO 22000 standard for high-end culinary logistics.
faq.complianceQuestion: How often are compliance registries updated?
faq.complianceAnswer: The Editorial Trust updates the compliance registry on the first Monday of every quarter. Significant regulatory shifts may trigger mid-cycle updates.
faq.directAssistanceDescription: Our curators are available for high-priority inquiries and dispute resolution.
faq.archivistNote: "Integrity is the final ingredient in every dish we deliver. This help center serves as our ledger of transparency."

editorial.description: We don't just deliver packages; we manage reputations. Every document, every protocol, and every support ticket is handled with the precision of a master chef's garnish.

form.title: Send us a message
form.description: Questions, order concerns, or feedback go straight to the restaurant support team.

landing.description: Invite friends, family, or teammates to build one shared order. Everyone adds their own meal, and the final checkout stays clean.
landing.activeDetected: Active group order detected. Continue from your lobby.
landing.experienceDescription: Perfect for office lunches, family dinners, and friends.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.shareDescription: Invite friends to join via SMS or messaging apps. Anyone with the link can join your curated session instantly.
howItWorks.picksDescription: Members add their own favorite items to the cart. Real-time updates let you see exactly who's picked what.
howItWorks.checkoutDescription: Review the total list and order everything at once. One payment, one delivery, zero coordination stress.

readyToHost.title: Ready to host your first group order?
readyToHost.description: Create a shared order room, invite your people, and let everyone add their favorites before checkout.

features.singleDeliveryDescription: Reduce fees and carbon footprint. All meals arrive in one go.
features.groupChatDescription: Discuss toppings or shared appetizers in the live order room.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.atGlanceDescription: We prioritize your privacy by design. Our commitment is to be transparent about how we collect, use, and protect your data.
privacy.noSaleDescription: We never sell your personal info to third parties.
privacy.dataCollectionDescription: We collect information you provide directly to us when you create an account, update your profile, or request customer support. This information may include:
privacy.technicalDataDescription: We also automatically collect technical data such as your IP address, browser type, and operating system to improve our service delivery and security protocols.
privacy.cookiesDescription: Our website uses cookies to distinguish you from other users. This helps us provide you with a good experience when you browse our website and also allows us to improve our site.
privacy.cookiesQuote: Cookies are small text files placed on your computer by websites that you visit. They are widely used to make websites work.
privacy.legalProfileDescription: Business and tax details provided by the restaurant.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.description: Please read these terms carefully. By accessing our services, you agree to be bound by the architectural precision of our legal framework.
terms.introductionParagraphOne: Welcome to our platform. These Terms and Conditions govern your use of our website and services. By using our service, you accept these terms in full. If you disagree with these terms or any part of these terms, you must not use our service.
terms.introductionParagraphTwo: Our services are designed with intentional clarity to ensure your legal rights are protected while maintaining operational excellence.
terms.acceptableUseDescription: You must not use this website in any way that causes, or may cause, damage to the website or impairment of the availability or accessibility of the service.
terms.restrictedAccessDescription: Access to certain areas of this website is restricted. We reserve the right to restrict access to other areas of this website, or indeed our whole website, at our discretion.
terms.noWarrantiesDescription: This website is provided as is without any representations or warranties, express or implied. We make no representations in relation to this website or the information and materials provided.
terms.indemnityDescription: You hereby indemnify us and undertake to keep us indemnified against any losses, damages, costs, liabilities and expenses incurred or suffered by us arising out of any breach by you.
terms.informalNegotiationDescription: Parties shall first attempt to resolve any dispute informally for at least 30 days before initiating arbitration.
terms.bindingArbitrationDescription: If informal talks fail, disputes will be resolved through final and binding arbitration under the rules of the local jurisdiction.

refund.title: Refund Request
refund.description: The Editorial Trust ensures that every culinary experience meets our rigorous standards. If your order fell short, please document the discrepancy below for our reconciliation team.
refund.reviewTimelineDescription: Requests are processed within 24-48 hours. You will receive an electronic notice once the credit has been issued to your original payment method.
refund.evidenceRequiredDescription: For quality or accuracy claims, high-resolution photographic evidence is mandatory to facilitate the investigation with our courier partners.
refund.messagePlaceholder: Please provide specific details regarding the issue...
refund.verificationDescription: Our system cross-references GPS logs, kitchen timestamps, and your provided documentation.
refund.adjudicationDescription: A member of our quality control trust reviews cases that do not meet automated approval thresholds.
refund.reimbursementDescription: Credits are issued as either Editorial Points for immediate use or returned to your banking institution.

validation.acceptTermsRequired: Please accept the terms and privacy policy
validation.avatarUrlInvalid: Avatar must be a valid URL or relative path
validation.reservationPastDate: Past dates are not available for reservation.
validation.reservationGuestWholeNumber: Guest count must be a whole number
validation.reservationGuestMin: Guest count must be at least 1
validation.reservationGuestMax: Guest count must be 20 or fewer
validation.reservationNoteMax: Special request must be 500 characters or fewer
validation.reviewMax: Review must be 1000 characters or fewer
